one_time_description: CIBC 1906 Land Claim loan proceeds of $2,270,148 (prior year was $19,201,727)
economic_notes: Government business enterprises include Pasqua TLE Holdings Inc. (100%), PFN Group of Companies Limited Partnership (99.9%, includes Pro Metal Industries Ltd.), and PFN Group of Companies Inc. (100%). Paskwa Pit Stop is fully consolidated. First Nation has 8.3% interest in FHQTC Developments LP and 8.3% interest in Keseechiwan Holdings LP.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021), audited April 20, 2022. Financial statements do not include the TLE Trust or Pasqua First Nation Legacy Trust (separate audited statements). GBEs use fiscal year ending December 31, 2020. Large CIBC 1906 Land Claim loan proceeds of $2.27M recognized as revenue (prior year $19.2M). Pasqua Legacy Trust annual income of $4.189M is a significant item. Net debt position of $16.96M. Investment in GBEs is negative ($3.82M) due to losses in PFN Group of Companies LP. Total government transfers estimated as ISC + FNIHB + CMHC + CMHC rental + Trust funds; OSR calculated as total revenue minus estimated government transfers. CMHC mortgages total $8,565,348 (current + long-term). Current liabilities include bank indebtedness $1,140,770 + accounts payable $2,349,966 + deferred revenue ISC $3,830,410 + current LTD $1,707,118 + current CMHC $640,885.
